# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_URL',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'URL to download the build artifact from (S3, Artifactory, HTTP server)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'SHA-256 checksum of the artifact for integrity verification'
        )
        choice(
            name: 'TARGET_ENVIRONMENT',
            choices: ['staging', 'production'],
            description: 'Target deployment environment'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOY_SERVERS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Comma-separated list of server hostnames to deploy to'
        )
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_NAME',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Expected artifact filename (e.g., myapp-1.2.3.tar.gz)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOY_PATH',
            defaultValue: '/opt/app/releases',
            description: 'Deployment path on target servers'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'DRY_RUN',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Perform a dry run without actual deployment'
        )
    }

    environment {
        DOWNLOAD_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}/artifacts"
        ALLOWED_DOMAINS_CONFIG = 'allowed-artifact-domains'
        DEPLOY_CREDENTIAL_ID = 'deploy-ssh-key'
        ARTIFACTORY_CREDENTIAL_ID = 'artifactory-credentials'
        S3_CREDENTIAL_ID = 'aws-s3-credentials'
    }

    options {
        timeout(time: 30, unit: 'MINUTES')
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '20'))
        timestamps()
    }

    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    validateParameters()
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Validate URL Against Allowlist') {
            steps {
                script {
                    validateUrlAllowlist(params.ARTIFACT_URL)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Validate Server Targets') {
            steps {
                script {
                    validateServerTargets(params.DEPLOY_SERVERS)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh "mkdir -p ${DOWNLOAD_DIR}"
                    downloadArtifact(params.ARTIFACT_URL, params.ARTIFACT_NAME)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Verify Artifact Integrity') {
            steps {
                script {
                    verifyChecksum(
                        "${DOWNLOAD_DIR}/${params.ARTIFACT_NAME}",
                        params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM
                    )
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Security Scan Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    scanArtifact("${DOWNLOAD_DIR}/${params.ARTIFACT_NAME}")
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Validate Artifact Contents') {
            steps {
                script {
                    validateArtifactContents("${DOWNLOAD_DIR}/${params.ARTIFACT_NAME}")
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Approval Gate') {
            when {
                expression { params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT == 'production' && !params.DRY_RUN }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def approver = input(
                        message: "Approve deployment to PRODUCTION?",
                        submitterParameter: 'approver',
                        submitter: 'release-managers,devops-leads',
                        parameters: [
                            string(
                                name: 'APPROVAL_REASON',
                                defaultValue: '',
                                description: 'Reason for approval'
                            )
                        ]
                    )
                    echo "Deployment approved by: ${approver}"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Servers') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = params.DEPLOY_SERVERS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
                    def deployResults = [:]

                    if (params.DRY_RUN) {
                        echo "DRY RUN: Would deploy ${params.ARTIFACT_NAME} to servers: ${servers}"
                        echo "DRY RUN: Target path: ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}"
                        return
                    }

                    def parallelStages = [:]
                    servers.each { server ->
                        def serverName = server
                        parallelStages["Deploy to ${serverName}"] = {
                            deployResults[serverName] = deployToServer(
                                serverName,
                                "${DOWNLOAD_DIR}/${params.ARTIFACT_NAME}",
                                params.DEPLOY_PATH
                            )
                        }
                    }
                    parallel parallelStages

                    def failedServers = deployResults.findAll { !it.value }.collect { it.key }
                    if (failedServers) {
                        error "Deployment failed on servers: ${failedServers.join(', ')}"
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Post-Deployment Verification') {
            when {
                expression { !params.DRY_RUN }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = params.DEPLOY_SERVERS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
                    verifyDeployment(servers, params.DEPLOY_PATH, params.ARTIFACT_NAME)
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            script {
                sh "rm -rf ${DOWNLOAD_DIR}"
                echo "Cleaned up downloaded artifacts"
            }
        }
        success {
            script {
                def action = params.DRY_RUN ? 'DRY RUN completed' : 'deployed'
                echo "Artifact ${params.ARTIFACT_NAME} ${action} successfully to ${params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT}"
                auditLog('SUCCESS', params)
            }
        }
        failure {
            script {
                echo "Deployment of ${params.ARTIFACT_NAME} to ${params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT} FAILED"
                auditLog('FAILURE', params)
            }
        }
    }
}

def validateParameters() {
    def errors = []

    if (!params.ARTIFACT_URL?.trim()) {
        errors << 'ARTIFACT_URL is required'
    }

    if (!params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM?.trim()) {
        errors << 'ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM is required for integrity verification'
    } else if (!(params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM ==~ /^[a-fA-F0-9]{64}$/)) {
        errors << 'ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM must be a valid SHA-256 hash (64 hex characters)'
    }

    if (!params.DEPLOY_SERVERS?.trim()) {
        errors << 'DEPLOY_SERVERS is required'
    }

    if (!params.ARTIFACT_NAME?.trim()) {
        errors << 'ARTIFACT_NAME is required'
    } else {
        if (!(params.ARTIFACT_NAME ==~ /^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9._\-]{0,254}$/)) {
            errors << 'ARTIFACT_NAME contains invalid characters or is too long. Only alphanumeric, dots, hyphens, and underscores are allowed.'
        }
        if (params.ARTIFACT_NAME.contains('..')) {
            errors << 'ARTIFACT_NAME must not contain path traversal sequences'
        }
    }

    if (!params.DEPLOY_PATH?.trim()) {
        errors << 'DEPLOY_PATH is required'
    } else {
        def normalizedPath = new File(params.DEPLOY_PATH).canonicalPath
        def allowedBasePaths = ['/opt/app/releases', '/var/www/releases', '/srv/deployments']
        if (!allowedBasePaths.any { normalizedPath.startsWith(it) }) {
            errors << "DEPLOY_PATH must be under one of: ${allowedBasePaths.join(', ')}"
        }
    }

    if (errors) {
        error "Parameter validation failed:\n${errors.collect { "  - ${it}" }.join('\n')}"
    }

    echo "All parameters validated successfully"
}

def validateUrlAllowlist(String url) {
    def allowedDomains = [
        's3.amazonaws.com',
        's3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com',
        's3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com',
        's3.eu-west-1.amazonaws.com',
        'artifactory.example.com',
        'nexus.example.com',
        'releases.internal.example.com'
    ]

    def allowedProtocols = ['https']

    try {
        def parsedUrl = new URI(url)

        def scheme = parsedUrl.scheme?.toLowerCase()
        if (!allowedProtocols.contains(scheme)) {
            error "URL protocol '${scheme}' is not allowed. Only ${allowedProtocols} are permitted."
        }

        def host = parsedUrl.host?.toLowerCase()
        if (!host) {
            error "Could not parse hostname from URL"
        }

        def isAllowed = allowedDomains.any { domain ->
            host == domain || host.endsWith(".${domain}")
        }

        if (!isAllowed) {
            error "Host '${host}' is not in the allowed domains list. Allowed: ${allowedDomains.join(', ')}"
        }

        if (parsedUrl.userInfo) {
            error "URLs with embedded credentials are not allowed"
        }

        def path = parsedUrl.path ?: ''
        if (path.contains('..') || path.contains('//')) {
            error "URL path contains suspicious sequences"
        }

        def fragment = parsedUrl.fragment
        if (fragment) {
            error "URLs with fragments are not allowed"
        }

        // Prevent SSRF by blocking internal/private IP ranges
        def inetAddress = InetAddress.getByName(host)
        if (inetAddress.isLoopbackAddress() || inetAddress.isLinkLocalAddress() ||
            inetAddress.isSiteLocalAddress() || inetAddress.isAnyLocalAddress()) {
            error "URL resolves to a private/internal IP address. This is not allowed."
        }

        echo "URL validated against allowlist: ${host} (protocol: ${scheme})"

    } catch (URISyntaxException e) {
        error "Invalid URL format: ${e.message}"
    }
}

def validateServerTargets(String serversParam) {
    def allowedServerPatterns = [
        ~/^prod-web-\d{1,3}\.example\.com$/,
        ~/^staging-web-\d{1,3}\.example\.com$/,
        ~/^prod-app-\d{1,3}\.example\.com$/,
        ~/^staging-app-\d{1,3}\.example\.com$/
    ]

    def servers = serversParam.split(',').collect { it.trim() }

    if (servers.size() > 20) {
        error "Too many target servers specified (max 20)"
    }

    servers.each { server ->
        if (!server) {
            error "Empty server name found in DEPLOY_SERVERS"
        }

        def isAllowed = allowedServerPatterns.any { pattern ->
            server ==~ pattern
        }

        if (!isAllowed) {
            error "Server '${server}' does not match any allowed server pattern"
        }

        if (params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT == 'production' && server.startsWith('staging-')) {
            error "Cannot deploy to staging server '${server}' when target environment is production"
        }
        if (params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT == 'staging' && server.startsWith('prod-')) {
            error "Cannot deploy to production server '${server}' when target environment is staging"
        }
    }

    echo "All ${servers.size()} target servers validated successfully"
}

def downloadArtifact(String url, String artifactName) {
    def parsedUrl = new URI(url)
    def host = parsedUrl.host?.toLowerCase()

    def sanitizedArtifactName = artifactName.replaceAll(/[^a-zA-Z0-9._\-]/, '')
    def targetPath = "${DOWNLOAD_DIR}/${sanitizedArtifactName}"

    if (host.contains('s3.amazonaws.com') || host ==~ /s3\.[a-z0-9\-]+\.amazonaws\.com/) {
        echo "Downloading from S3..."
        withCredentials([[$class: 'AmazonWebServicesCredentialsBinding',
                          credentialsId: S3_CREDENTIAL_ID,
                          accessKeyVariable: 'AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID',
                          secretKeyVariable: 'AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY']]) {
            sh """
                set -euo pipefail
                aws s3 cp '${url}' '${targetPath}' \
                    --no-progress \
                    --expected-size 0
            """
        }
    } else if (host.contains('artifactory.example.com')) {
        echo "Downloading from Artifactory..."
        withCredentials([usernamePassword(
            credentialsId: ARTIFACTORY_CREDENTIAL_ID,
            usernameVariable: 'ARTIFACTORY_USER',
            passwordVariable: 'ARTIFACTORY_PASSWORD')]) {
            sh """
                set -euo pipefail
                curl --fail --silent --show-error \
                    --location \
                    --max-time 300 \
                    --max-filesize 1073741824 \
                    --proto '=https' \
                    --user "\${ARTIFACTORY_USER}:\${ARTIFACTORY_PASSWORD}" \
                    --output '${targetPath}' \
                    '${url}'
            """
        }
    } else {
        echo "Downloading from HTTPS server..."
        sh """
            set -euo pipefail
            curl --fail --silent --show-error \
                --location \
                --max-time 300 \
                --max-filesize 1073741824 \
                --max-redirs 3 \
                --proto '=https' \
                --output '${targetPath}' \
                '${url}'
        """
    }

    def fileExists = sh(script: "test -f '${targetPath}' && echo 'true' || echo 'false'", returnStdout: true).trim()
    if (fileExists != 'true') {
        error "Artifact download failed - file not found at ${targetPath}"
    }

    def fileSize = sh(script: "stat -c%s '${targetPath}'", returnStdout: true).trim()
    echo "Downloaded artifact: ${sanitizedArtifactName} (${fileSize} bytes)"

    if (fileSize.toLong() == 0) {
        error "Downloaded artifact is empty (0 bytes)"
    }

    if (fileSize.toLong() > 1073741824) {
        error "Downloaded artifact exceeds maximum allowed size of 1GB"
    }
}

def verifyChecksum(String filePath, String expectedChecksum) {
    echo "Verifying SHA-256 checksum..."

    def actualChecksum = sh(
        script: "sha256sum '${filePath}' | awk '{print \$1}'",
        returnStdout: true
    ).trim().toLowerCase()

    def normalizedExpected = expectedChecksum.trim().toLowerCase()

    if (actualChecksum != normalizedExpected) {
        error """Checksum verification FAILED!
Expected: ${normalizedExpected}
Actual:   ${actualChecksum}
The artifact may have been tampered with or corrupted during download."""
    }

    echo "Checksum verification passed: ${actualChecksum}"
}

def scanArtifact(String filePath) {
    echo "Running security scan on artifact..."

    def fileType = sh(
        script: "file --brief --mime-type '${filePath}'",
        returnStdout: true
    ).trim()

    def allowedMimeTypes = [
        'application/gzip',
        'application/x-gzip',
        'application/x-tar',
        'application/zip',
        'application/java-archive',
        'application/x-compressed-tar',
        'application/octet-stream'
    ]

    if (!allowedMimeTypes.contains(fileType)) {
        error "Artifact has unexpected MIME type: ${fileType}. Allowed types: ${allowedMimeTypes.join(', ')}"
    }

    echo "File type check passed: ${fileType}"

    def clamScanAvailable = sh(script: 'which clamscan 2>/dev/null', returnStatus: true) == 0
    if (clamScanAvailable) {
        def scanResult = sh(
            script: "clamscan --no-summary '${filePath}'",
            returnStatus: true
        )
        if (scanResult != 0) {
            error "ClamAV scan detected potential malware in the artifact!"
        }
        echo "ClamAV scan passed"
    } else {
        echo "WARNING: ClamAV not available - skipping virus scan"
    }
}

def validateArtifactContents(String filePath) {
    echo "Validating artifact contents..."

    def fileName = filePath.split('/').last()

    if (fileName.endsWith('.tar.gz') || fileName.endsWith('.tgz')) {
        def suspiciousFiles = sh(
            script: """
                set -euo pipefail
                tar tzf '${filePath}' 2>/dev/null | grep -E '(^/|\\.\\./)' || true
            """,
            returnStdout: true
        ).trim()

        if (suspiciousFiles) {
            error """Artifact contains suspicious paths (absolute paths or path traversal):
${suspiciousFiles}
This artifact has been rejected for security reasons."""
        }

        def symlinkCheck = sh(
            script: """
                set -euo pipefail
                tar tvf '${filePath}' 2>/dev/null | grep '^l' | grep -E '(\\.\\./|^/)' || true
            """,
            returnStdout: true
        ).trim()

        if (symlinkCheck) {
            error """Artifact contains suspicious symlinks:
${symlinkCheck}
This artifact has been rejected for security reasons."""
        }

        echo "Archive content validation passed"

    } else if (fileName.endsWith('.zip') || fileName.endsWith('.jar') || fileName.endsWith('.war')) {
        def suspiciousFiles = sh(
            script: """
                set -euo pipefail
                unzip -l '${filePath}' 2>/dev/null | awk '{print \$4}' | grep -E '(^/|\\.\\./)' || true
            """,
            returnStdout: true
        ).trim()

        if (suspiciousFiles) {
            error """Artifact contains suspicious paths:
${suspiciousFiles}
This artifact has been rejected for security reasons."""
        }

        echo "ZIP content validation passed"
    }
}

def deployToServer(String server, String artifactPath, String deployPath) {
    echo "Deploying to ${server}..."

    try {
        def sanitizedDeployPath = deployPath.replaceAll(/[^a-zA-Z0-9\/._\-]/, '')
        def artifactFileName = artifactPath.split('/').last()
        def timestamp = new Date().format('yyyyMMdd-HHmmss')
        def releaseDir = "${sanitizedDeployPath}/${timestamp}"

        sshagent(credentials: [DEPLOY_CREDENTIAL_ID]) {
            sh """
                set -euo pipefail

                # Create release directory
                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
                    -o BatchMode=yes \
                    -o ConnectTimeout=10 \
                    "deploy@${server}" \
                    "mkdir -p '${releaseDir}'"

                # Transfer artifact
                scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
                    -o BatchMode=yes \
                    -o ConnectTimeout=10 \
                    '${artifactPath}' \
                    "deploy@${server}:${releaseDir}/${artifactFileName}"

                # Extract and set up on remote server
                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
                    -o BatchMode=yes \
                    -o ConnectTimeout=10 \
                    "deploy@${server}" \
                    "cd '${releaseDir}' && \\
                     if echo '${artifactFileName}' | grep -qE '\\.(tar\\.gz|tgz)\$'; then \\
                         tar xzf '${artifactFileName}' --no-same-owner --no-same-permissions; \\
                     elif echo '${artifactFileName}' | grep -qE '\\.zip\$'; then \\
                         unzip -o '${artifactFileName}'; \\
                     fi && \\
                     ln -sfn '${releaseDir}' '${sanitizedDeployPath}/current' && \\
                     echo 'Deployment successful on ${server}'"
            """
        }

        echo "Successfully deployed to ${server}"
        return true

    } catch (Exception e) {
        echo "ERROR: Deployment to ${server} failed: ${e.message}"
        return false
    }
}

def verifyDeployment(List<String> servers, String deployPath, String artifactName) {
    echo "Running post-deployment verification..."

    def sanitizedDeployPath = deployPath.replaceAll(/[^a-zA-Z0-9\/._\-]/, '')
    def failedVerifications = []

    sshagent(credentials: [DEPLOY_CREDENTIAL_ID]) {
        servers.each { server ->
            try {
                def currentLinkExists = sh(
                    script: """
                        ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
                            -o BatchMode=yes \
                            -o ConnectTimeout=10 \
                            "deploy@${server}" \
                            "test -L '${sanitizedDeployPath}/current' && echo 'true' || echo 'false'"
                    """,
                    returnStdout: true
                ).trim()

                if (currentLinkExists != 'true') {
                    failedVerifications << "${server}: current symlink not found"
                    return
                }

                def healthCheck = sh(
                    script: """
                        ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
                            -o BatchMode=yes \
                            -o ConnectTimeout=10 \
                            "deploy@${server}" \
                            "if [ -f '${sanitizedDeployPath}/current/health-check.sh' ]; then \\
                                 bash '${sanitizedDeployPath}/current/health-check.sh'; \\
                             else \\
                                 echo 'No health check script found - skipping'; \\
                             fi"
                    """,
                    returnStatus: true
                )

                if (healthCheck != 0) {
                    failedVerifications << "${server}: health check failed"
                } else {
                    echo "Verification passed for ${server}"
                }

            } catch (Exception e) {
                failedVerifications << "${server}: ${e.message}"
            }
        }
    }

    if (failedVerifications) {
        error "Post-deployment verification failed:\n${failedVerifications.collect { "  - ${it}" }.join('\n')}"
    }

    echo "All post-deployment verifications passed"
}

def auditLog(String status, def params) {
    def auditEntry = [
        timestamp: new Date().format("yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'", TimeZone.getTimeZone('UTC')),
        status: status,
        buildNumber: env.BUILD_NUMBER,
        buildUrl: env.BUILD_URL,
        triggeredBy: currentBuild.getBuildCauses().collect { it.shortDescription }.join(', '),
        artifactUrl: params.ARTIFACT_URL,
        artifactName: params.ARTIFACT_NAME,
        artifactChecksum: params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM,
        targetEnvironment: params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT,
        targetServers: params.DEPLOY_SERVERS,
        deployPath: params.DEPLOY_PATH,
        dryRun: params.DRY_RUN
    ]

    echo "AUDIT LOG: ${groovy.json.JsonOutput.prettyPrint(groovy.json.JsonOutput.toJson(auditEntry))}"

    writeFile(
        file: "audit-${env.BUILD_NUMBER}.json",
        text: groovy.json.JsonOutput.prettyPrint(groovy.json.JsonOutput.toJson(auditEntry))
    )
    archiveArtifacts artifacts: "audit-${env.BUILD_NUMBER}.json", allowEmptyArchive: true
}
